page: Microsoft Azure HB120-64rs_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the HBv3 family, designed for high-performance computing workloads. It features 64 dedicated physical vCPUs powered by Intel processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 456.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 7.12 GB of RAM per core. For local storage requirements, the instance includes 2412 GB of temporary storage and supports Premium Storage configurations.

This instance is RDMA (Remote Direct Memory Access) capable, enabling low-latency, high-bandwidth interconnects suitable for clustered configurations and parallel computing tasks. The lack of integrated GPUs makes it less suitable for hardware-accelerated deep learning, but its high core count and substantial memory footprint make it highly efficient for memory-intensive and compute-heavy simulations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the HB120-64rs_v3 offers a balanced resource density, combining a high vCPU count with a large memory allocation and fast local storage without the premium cost of dedicated GPU hardware. This makes it highly suitable for workloads such as computational fluid dynamics, finite element analysis, molecular dynamics, large-scale scientific simulations, and memory-intensive database operations.
description: Microsoft Azure HB120-64rs_v3 is a high-performance computing instance from the HBv3 family, built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 456.0 GB of RAM, and 2412 GB of local storage. The instance supports RDMA and Premium Storage, making it highly capable for clustered environments and parallel processing workloads. While it lacks dedicated GPU hardware, its high core density and substantial memory capacity provide a cost-effective platform for resource-intensive simulations. This server is optimized for workloads such as computational fluid dynamics, finite element analysis, scientific computing, and large-scale database operations.

tagline: A high-performance computing instance featuring dedicated processors, massive memory capacity, and low-latency RDMA networking for parallel simulation workloads.
